title: Changing how we develop Ladybird
author: EdwinHoksberg
aiHeadline: Ladybird finally decides to update its development process, because apparently 'old school' wasn't working out.

title: C++: The Documentary
author: ingve
aiHeadline: C++ gets its own documentary, proving that even programming languages can have midlife crises.

title: Gov.uk has replaced Stripe with Dutch provider Adyen
author: toomuchtodo
aiHeadline: Gov.uk dumps Stripe for a Dutch provider, proving that sometimes you need to go abroad for better service.

title: Tracing a powerful GNSS interference source over Europe
author: mimorigasaka
aiHeadline: Scientists finally figure out how to trace powerful GNSS interference, because apparently 'magic' wasn't a valid explanation.

title: Astronauts told to return to ISS after sheltering over air leak repairs
author: janpot
aiHeadline: Astronauts told to return to ISS after sheltering during repairs, proving that even in space, you can't escape a leaky apartment.
